message:
deps: add ahash 0.8 for fast non-cryptographic hashing

Add the ahash crate (v0.8) to workspace dependencies in the root
Cargo.toml. ahash provides a fast, non-cryptographic hash function
optimized for hot-path HashMap lookups, inspired by fff.nvim's
approach to minimizing per-lookup overhead. This prepares the
foundation for switching performance-critical HashMaps in the fusion
and index crates from the default SipHash to ahash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -94,6 +94,9 @@ hnsw_rs = "0.3"
 # CRC32 checksums for FSVI index integrity
 crc32fast = "1"
 
+# Fast non-cryptographic hashing for hot-path HashMaps (inspired by fff.nvim)
+ahash = "0.8"
+
 # Unicode normalization
 unicode-normalization = "0.1"
